/usr/bin/ar qc libfountain.a CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/fountain_c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/fountain_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/event_json_nlohmann.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/queue_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/time_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/id_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/backoff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/sqlite/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain.dir/src/sqlite/statement.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfountain.a
